verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am your servant And I am listening Speak to me Lord, speak to me I need your wisdom And truth and comfort Speak to me Lord, speak to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Speak to me, speak to me Through your word, through your spirit Speak your words of life Speak to me, speak to me I am listening, I am waiting Speak to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I am your servant And I am listening Speak to me Lord, speak to me My heart is silent My soul is longing
